title: Solo leveling
description: a modpack based on the anime solo leveling
body:
Here’s the English version of your description:  

This is a modpack based on the anime *Solo Leveling*! You start as an ordinary hunter and must search for mysterious **Gates** that appear throughout the world. Each Gate takes you to a dangerous dungeon filled with monsters that you must defeat to grow stronger. By fighting and defeating enemies, you gain **XP and loot**, allowing you to **level up and unlock new abilities**.  

But be careful! You also have **daily quests** that you need to complete to earn extra rewards. If you ignore your quests for too long, there could be serious consequences... Maybe you’ll lose rewards, or even worse, your strength. The stronger you become, the harder the dungeons and enemies you’ll face! Can you rise to the top and become an **S-rank Hunter**?  

Explore, fight, complete your missions, and become the ultimate **Solo Leveling legend**! 💥🔥
